media_coverage.name: Specialized Media Coverage
media_coverage.description: Freezes all People relation changes at end of this round.

media_shielding.name: Media Shielding
media_shielding.description: Freezes all Military relation changes at end of this round.

media_blackout.name: Media Blackout
media_blackout.description: Freezes all Business relation changes at end of this round.

advisor_0.name: Kiki
advisor_0.description: Your cousin. Dropped out of the Economics program due to legal troubles. Wakes up at 4 pm.

advisor_1.name: Edward
advisor_1.description: A certified economist. Slightly right, slightly wrong. Considers bell pepper 'spicy'.

advisor_2.name: Ricky
advisor_2.description: Good economist, talks loud and talks a lot. Knows almost everything about economics and has unmatched charisma. Terrified of the passage of time.

advisor_3.name: Alfonso
advisor_3.description: The crème de la crème. Expert in everything involving real, unreal, and unimaginable numbers. Can prevent a crisis with a pin. No one has ever seen him smile.

statue.name: Giant Statue
statue.description: Permanently increases your Charisma by +1. A monument to your glory appears in the city.
statue.full: The city cannot fit any more statues.
